=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

  Target signature provides too few arguments. Expected 1 or more, but got 0.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (5:45-5:46) TS7006: Parameter '_' implicitly has an 'any' type.
  (no quick fixes)

  Fix 0: "Disable effectGenUsesAdapter for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectGenUsesAdapter for entire file"
